name: Loren's Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Use a spring form pan.
2. Mix crushed graham crackers, butter, and sugar for the crust mixture. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 8 minutes.
3. Cool for 15 minutes.
4. Combine filling ingredients in a bowl and mix together with an electric mixer until fluffy.
5. Pour into the cooled crust and bake at 350°F (175°C) for 30 minutes.
6. Cool for 30 minutes.
7. Combine all topping ingredients in another bowl and beat until fluffy.
8. Pour over the cheesecake (cooled) and bake for an additional 10 minutes at 350°F (175°C).
9. Refrigerate several hours or overnight.
